container.text: ⚠️ SIMULATION ONLY | MODEL INPUTS | TRL 4 Lab Context
Model inputs: 1000× vs CPU | 100× vs GPU | ~1 pJ/MAC (TRL 4)

widget.text: Model assumption: System Power = Array ~45% | ADC/DAC ~40% | Peripherals ~15%
Model input references (not validated): Samsung Nature 2025 range, NVIDIA H100 datasheets, Intel/AMD datasheets
Caveat: all values are model inputs/derived estimates (TRL4).

container.text: ⚠️ SIMULATION ONLY | MODEL INPUTS (market scenarios) | TRL 4→9 Required
Model input references (not validated): WSTS + Gartner (2025)
Confidence-aware model scoring (0-100) across key categories
Sources: Samsung Nature 2025, IEEE IRPS 2022, Nano Letters 2024, CEA-Leti 2024

widget.text: Model input references (not validated): NVIDIA H100 datasheets, Intel/AMD datasheets | Cost: $0.10/kWh
Scenario Diff (Run A vs Run B)
Output deltas: map[co2_reduction_pct:0 energy_reduction_pct:0 latency_reduction_pct:0 tco_reduction_pct:0]
Attribution: [co2_reduction_pct delta 0.00 is driven by changed assumptions in profile energy_reduction_pct delta 0.00 is driven by changed assumptions in profile
latency_reduction_pct delta 0.00 is driven by changed assumptions in profile tco_reduction_pct delta 0.00 is driven by changed assumptions in profile]
TOTAL: 18-36 months to production silicon (model input)
TOTAL: $5-50M+ to first working chip (model input)
• Novel memory tech adds additional risk
• Yield challenges for analog multi-level cells
SIMULATION ONLY - NOT VALIDATED | TRL 4 Lab Prototype | All values are model inputs
